title: SiTime Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript - Stock Surges on Beat
text: Earnings call transcript of SiTime's Q1 2026 results shows the company beat expectations with revenue of $113.6 million and non-GAAP EPS of $1.44. The stock surged on the strong beat driven by AI infrastructure demand and record gross margins. Management outlined the company's strategic focus on AI data center timing solutions and the importance of the Elite 2 Super-TCXO product line. The company raised full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance to at least 80%, significantly above the long-term target of 25%-30%, driven by exceptional AI infrastructure demand. Discussion of the Renesas timing business acquisition highlighted the strategic value of combining SiTime's MEMS technology with Renesas' traditional oscillator business.
